content:
-    Server ServerConfig `mapstructure:"server"`
-    Redis  RedisConfig  `mapstructure:"redis"`
+    Server   ServerConfig   `mapstructure:"server"`
+    Redis    RedisConfig    `mapstructure:"redis"`

// Database defaults
v.SetDefault("database.host", "localhost")
v.SetDefault("database.port", 5432)
v.SetDefault("database.name", "mtsg")
v.SetDefault("database.user", "mtsg_user")
v.SetDefault("database.password", "")
v.SetDefault("database.sslmode", "disable")

type DatabaseConfig struct {
    Host     string `mapstructure:"host"`
    Port     int    `mapstructure:"port"`
    Name     string `mapstructure:"name"`
    User     string `mapstructure:"user"`
    Password string `mapstructure:"password"`
    SSLMode  string `mapstructure:"sslmode"`
}

- `MTSG_DATABASE_HOST` - Database host (default: localhost)
- `MTSG_DATABASE_PORT` - Database port (default: 5432)
- `MTSG_DATABASE_NAME` - Database name (default: mtsg)
- `MTSG_DATABASE_USER` - Database user (default: mtsg_user)
- `MTSG_DATABASE_PASSWORD` - Database password (default: empty)
- `MTSG_DATABASE_SSLMODE` - SSL mode (default: disable)

database:
  host: "localhost"
  port: 5432
  name: "mtsg"
  user: "mtsg_user"
  password: ""
  sslmode: "disable"
